---
title: "Figure 5 (distortion lines) — macro_IR diagonal distortion factors vs interval, by parameter and noise"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Leaner replacement for the distortion-diagonal CORNERS. The diagonal of a distortion matrix is a
per-parameter scalar, so the natural view is 1D: the factor vs the measurement interval, one curve
per N_ch (colour), faceted parameter (rows) x noise (columns). log-log, reference 1 = no distortion,
bootstrap 95% CI as a thin bar. Reliable points only (bootstrap CI half-width <= ERR_MAX).

ONE Rmd emits THREE PDFs, one per distortion matrix (Information / Sample / Correlation).
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR <- "../data/433ed13"
NSIM     <- 10000
NOISES   <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
ALGO     <- "macro_IR"
REF      <- 1                                     # distortion factor reference (no distortion)
ERR_MAX  <- 0.2                                   # drop points whose bootstrap CI half-width > this

ORD       <- c("on", "off", "unitary_current", "Num_ch_mean")
PIDX      <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")

MATS <- list(
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Information_Distortion",
       title = "Information distortion (diagonal)", pdf = "Figure_5_info_distortion_lines.pdf"),
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Sample_Distortion",
       title = "Sample distortion (diagonal)",      pdf = "Figure_5_sample_distortion_lines.pdf"),
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion",
       title = "Correlation distortion (diagonal)", pdf = "Figure_5_corr_distortion_lines.pdf"))
```

```{r read}
read_tagged <- function(z) {
  files <- Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_battery_sim.csv", NSIM, ALGO, z)))
  map_dfr(files, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% mutate(noise = z))
}
bsim <- map_dfr(NOISES, read_tagged)
```

```{r extractor}
# GENERIC: the DIAGONAL of a per-parameter matrix component (param_index == param_col), with the
# bootstrap mean (value) and the 95% percentile-bootstrap CI (lo/hi), per (noise, N_ch, interval,
# param). Keeps only points whose CI half-width <= ERR_MAX.
per_param_diag <- function(df, comp) {
  df %>%
    filter(component_path == comp, statistic == "value",
           param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX,
           probit == "mean" | (probit == "quantile" & quantile_level %in% c(0.025, 0.975))) %>%
    mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)],
           q = if_else(probit == "mean", "value",
                       if_else(quantile_level == 0.025, "lo", "hi"))) %>%
    group_by(noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name, q) %>%
    summarise(v = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = q, values_from = v) %>%
    filter(is.finite(lo), is.finite(hi), (hi - lo) / 2 <= ERR_MAX) %>%
    mutate(param = factor(param_name, levels = ORD, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD])),
           noise = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)),
           Nch   = factor(Num_ch, levels = sort(unique(Num_ch))))
}
```

```{r plot-fn}
# round factor ticks around 1 (kept inside the panel range)
breaks_around1 <- function(l) {
  v <- c(.5, .6, .7, .8, .9, 1, 1.1, 1.2, 1.3, 1.5, 2, 3)
  v[v >= min(l) & v <= max(l)]
}

plot_lines <- function(dd, title) {
  ggplot(dd, aes(interval_in_tau, value, colour = Nch, group = Num_ch)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = REF, colour = "grey70", linewidth = .3, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), linewidth = .3, alpha = .5) +
    geom_line(linewidth = .4) +
    geom_point(size = .8) +
    facet_grid(param ~ noise, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
    scale_x_log10(breaks = c(.01, .1, 1)) +
    scale_y_log10(breaks = breaks_around1) +
    scale_colour_viridis_d(name = expression(N[ch]), end = .9) +
    labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = "distortion factor  (1 = no distortion)", title = title) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
          strip.text = element_text(size = 8), plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
}

build_one <- function(comp, title, pdf) {
  dd <- per_param_diag(bsim, comp)
  g  <- plot_lines(dd, paste0("macro_IR  ", title))
  ggsave(pdf, g, width = 7.0, height = 8.0)
  g
}
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 8.0, results = "asis"}
for (M in MATS) print(build_one(M$comp, M$title, M$pdf))
```
